content:
Song: Just Like Jesse James
Artist: Cher

Transcribed by Mark Geater (geat@zoom.co.uk)

[Verse 1]

[tab]       [ch]Ab[/ch]                              [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]       [ch]Db[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]                [ch]Ab[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]Eb[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]    [ch]Ab[/ch]                            [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]Eb[/ch]        [ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]             [ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Eb[/ch]

[tab]              [ch]Fm[/ch]                         [ch]Db[/ch]                        [ch]Ab[/ch]

I'm gonna shoot you down Jesse James



[tab]  [ch]Bbm[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]
e|-1---8--|

E|--------|[/tab]

My favourite way to play this song is with a clean, acoustic
sounding effect for the first two verses, then a heavy
distortion for the chorus, followed by a real smooth lead
sound for the solo, using the neck pickup. The actual record
is obviously played on a steel-stringed acoustic.

I play all of the chords using either the A or E shapes,
I find these sound closer to the record than if you use the D
shape for the Db and Eb.


******************************

| /   Slide up
| p   Pull-off
| ~   Vibrato
| br  Bend & release

******************************
